ModMetaData.name: Incremental Upgrades
ModMetaData.author: MarkB
ModMetaData.description:
Adds research-gated Mark I, II, and III upgrade tiers across a wide range of vanilla items. All upgrades are new items — originals remain buildable and are not replaced.
WEAPONS Autopistol, machine pistol, chain shotgun, heavy SMG, LMG, assault rifle, sniper rifle, minigun, charge rifle, and charge lance each gain three upgrade tiers with improved damage, accuracy, and range. Mark III versions require the Fabrication Bench.
ARMOR Flak vest, flak pants, recon armor, recon helmet, marine armor, and marine helmet each gain three tiers with improved protection. Shield belt gains three tiers with higher energy capacity and faster recharge.
TURRETS Mini-turret, autocannon turret, and uranium slug turret each gain three tiers with improved firepower, durability, and reduced cooldown.
BUILDINGS — POWER Solar generator, wind turbine, and battery each gain three tiers with improved output or storage capacity.
BUILDINGS — MISC Heater, cooler, hydroponics basin, vitals monitor, ground-penetrating scanner, long-range mineral scanner, moisture pump, and ship reactor each gain three tiers with improved performance.
BIONICS Nine bionic implants gain three upgrade tiers each with improved stat bonuses.
All upgrades are gated behind a dedicated research tab (Incremental Upgrades) with tiered Industrial and Spacer prerequisites.
